tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffold & tooling
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A buildable Next.js 15 + TypeScript + Tailwind project with Vitest and Playwright wired up, merged into the existing repo.

**Verify:** pnpm build && pnpm test:unit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "next.config.ts", "vitest.config.ts", "playwright.config.ts", "tests/unit/smoke.test.ts", ".env.example"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build && pnpm test:unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pnpm build succeeds", "smoke test passes", "playwright installed", "README/docs/.gitignore intact"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Persistence + authentication backend
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SQLite persistence via Prisma with WAL enabled, plus a working better-auth backend (email+password, DB sessions) whose auth tables are generated into the schema.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/auth.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "lib/db.ts", "lib/auth.ts", "lib/auth-client.ts", "app/api/auth/[...all]/route.ts", "tests/unit/auth.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/auth.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migrate creates auth tables", "WAL mode active", "signUp then signIn returns session", "user.role defaults to member"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Domain schema
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The complete M1 domain data model exists and round-trips through Prisma, with foreign keys to the better-auth User.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/schema.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "tests/unit/schema.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/schema.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["domain migration applies with all tables+enums", "document chain round-trips", "delete Document cascades"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Auth UI + authenticated shell
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Working /register and /login pages, a home showing the signed-in user + sign-out, and a guard redirecting unauthenticated users to /login.

**Verify:** pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/login/page.tsx", "app/register/page.tsx", "app/app/layout.tsx", "app/app/page.tsx", "components/SignOutButton.tsx", "middleware.ts", "lib/session.ts", "app/page.tsx", "tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["signed-out /app redirects to /login", "register lands on /app showing email", "sign out re-blocks /app", "e2e passes"]}
```
